_comment: Text-derived metrics system (Gap B). Per CALENDAR YEAR, from the human-in-the-loop Google Voice classification (personal account; see FFC-Cloudflare-Automation docs/runbooks/google-voice-metrics.md). Each thread is classified by party; charity-org threads are tagged by product category; net-new reach-outs are DISTINCT first-contact senders (deduped by first-appearance year) and give the velocity. Totals are exact when a year's pagination is exhausted; party/category splits come from the classification sample. 'charityThreads' = newCharity + existingCharity (charity orgs); volunteer threads are counted separately in byParty. 2023-2025 are classified; 2026 is YTD pending. 2023 threads span the full calendar year. The category split for 2023/2024 is extrapolated from the 2025 template shape (so 'migration' in particular may be overstated for the back-years); net-new reach-outs for 2023 and 2024 are independently enumerated distinct first-contact senders (deduped by first-appearance year), while 2025's velocity was rate-extrapolated in its original template pass (see each year's confidence note).

2023.confidence: Exact total 1999 via full pagination (40 pages); threads span the full calendar year (Jan 1-Dec 31 2023); party split calibrated on a ~99-thread sample (~83% noise, dominated by personal/family and day-job traffic); net-new reach-outs independently enumerated from 51 distinct charity contacts (26 volunteer, 25 newCharity); category split extrapolated from the 2025 template shape, so 'migration' may be overstated for 2023

2024.confidence: Exact total 1875 via full pagination (38 pages); party split calibrated on a 138-thread sample (~86% noise, heavy personal/family and day-job traffic); net-new reach-outs independently enumerated as distinct first-contact senders not seen in 2023 (15 volunteer, 16 newCharity); category split extrapolated from the 2025 template shape

2025.confidence: exact total (2079); party/category splits ~95% calibrated on a 40-thread sample; main uncertainty is one high-volume contributor (~94 threads) classed as volunteer; net-new reach-outs are rate-extrapolated
